privileged_info_summary: The task specifies creation of three product attributes in Magento: 'jewelry_material' (dropdown with options Gold, Silver, Bronze, Platinum), 'gemstone_type' (dropdown with options Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire, None), and 'chain_length_inches' (text field). These attributes must be organized into a new attribute set named 'Jewelry' with a group named 'Jewelry Specifications'. All attribute codes, input types, and options exactly match standard Magento conventions. The verifier validates successful completion by confirming the attributes exist with correct input types and all required options, the attribute set is created, the group exists within the set, and all three attributes are assigned to the group.
